mapper.select: SELECT * FROM group_join_ban WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_key = #{userKey}
SELECT * FROM group_join_ban WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY banned_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_join_ban (group_id, user_key, banned_at, banned_by_user_key, reason, active, unbanned_at, unbanned_by_user_key) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userKey}, NOW(), #{bannedByUserKey}, #{reason}, 1, NULL, NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE banned_at = NOW(), banned_by_user_key = #{bannedByUserKey}, reason = #{reason}, active = 1, unbanned_at = NULL, unbanned_by_user_key = NULL
